title: moraea bulbillifera subsp. bulbillifera
intro: Moraea bulbillifera subsp. bulbillifera, also known as the mountain iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Moraea bulbillifera subsp. bulbillifera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be infused in hot water to create a tea or used as a topical application.
